text.title: Team AI Usage Policy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there an existing company-wide AI policy < 6 months old?

conclusion.verdict: refresh existing policy; do not create a duplicate

branch.question: Does the team touch customer PII / payment / health / regulated data?

conclusion.verdict: full policy with all three lists, named DPO owner, monthly review for the first 6 months
lightweight policy: three lists + owner + quarterly review; IR runbook can be 2 steps

text.example: existing_current=false → q-data: PII + payment → full policy with DPO owner; monthly review for 6 months.
